startPoint.en: Talk to Larrissa, who is outside of the Lighthouse, north of the Barbarian Outpost.
startPoint.es: Habla con Larrissa, que está fuera del Lighthouse, al norte del Barbarian Outpost.

items.name: Plank
items.display: 2 normal planks (can be obtained during the quest, just north of the fenced-in area of the Barbarian Outpost)

recommended.name: A melee weapon (ideally a slash weapon), a ranged weapon (ideally thrown weapons), and magic weapon plus runes for all four elemental spells to switch amongst in combat. Necromancy does not work against the Dagannoth mother.
recommended.display: A melee weapon (ideally a slash weapon), a ranged weapon (ideally thrown weapons), and magic weapon plus runes for all four elemental spells to switch amongst in combat. Necromancy does not work against the Dagannoth mother.

recommended.name: Games necklace
recommended.display: Games necklace and quick teleport tabs are very helpful to reach the Lighthouse during the quest.

recommended.name: Player-owned house
recommended.display: Houses by Rellekka are also helpful transportation methods.

recommended.name: Lighthouse Teleport
recommended.display: Lighthouse Teleport for quick teleportation to Larrissa

rewards.name: God book
rewards.display: A damaged god book of your choice

rewards.name: Dagannoth Mother
rewards.display: The Dagannoth Mother is unlocked in the Dominion Tower

rewards.name: The Lighthouse Store
rewards.display: Access to The Lighthouse Store and the dagannoth caves underneath (There are level 77 and 78 dagannoths. The level 77's use an inaccurate ranged attack, while the level 78's use a much more effective melee attack)

rewards.name: Dagannoth (Slayer assignment)
rewards.display: The ability to request dagannoth as a Slayer assignment if the Mask of the Dagannoth is owned

text.en: Lighthouse Teleport or games necklace
Head to the lighthouse north of the Barbarian Outpost and talk to Larrissa.
text.es: Dirígete al lighthouse al norte del Barbarian Outpost y habla con Larrissa.

chatOptions: 3 I'll see what I can do

text.en: 60 steel nails, 2 planks, molten glass, swamp tar, 1 free inventory slot
Go south to the Barbarian Outpost, pick up two planks north of the Agility course.
text.es: Ve al sur, al Barbarian Outpost, y recoge dos tablones al norte del circuito de Agilidad.

text.en: Enter through the gate, then go through the Obstacle pipe.
text.es: Entra por la verja y luego atraviesa la tubería obstáculo.

text.en: Talk to Gunnjorn. (Make sure to have 1 free inventory slot)
text.es: Habla con Gunnjorn. (Asegúrate de tener 1 espacio libre en el inventario)

chatOptions: 1 Talk about Horror from the Deep.

text.en: Far east of Larrissa, go to a broken bridge, just past the crystal tree.
text.es: Muy al este de Larrissa, dirígete a un puente roto, justo pasado el árbol de cristal.

text.en: Fix the bridge from both sides (you can cross the bridge after the first side is repaired and right-click fix the other side).
text.es: Repara el puente desde ambos lados (puedes cruzarlo tras reparar el primer lado, y con el botón derecho reparar el otro lado).

text.en: Go to the 3rd floor and Repair the lighting mechanism three times.
text.es: Ve a la 3ª planta y repara el mecanismo de iluminación tres veces.

text.en: fire rune, air rune, water rune, earth rune (a staff will not work for any of these), any smithable sword, an arrow, combat equipment
Climb the iron ladder on the 1st floor to go to the lighthouse basement.
text.es: Sube por la escalera de hierro en la 1ª planta para ir al sótano del faro.

text.en: To open the strange wall, use a fire rune, air rune, water rune, earth rune, a sword, and an arrow on it.
text.es: Para abrir la pared extraña, usa en ella una runa de fuego, una runa de aire, una runa de agua, una runa de tierra, una espada y una flecha.

text.en: Open the eastern strange wall.
text.es: Abre la pared extraña del este.

text.en: Go down the ladder and talk to Jossik.
text.es: Baja por la escalera y habla con Jossik.

text.en: Kill the dagannoth that appears.
text.es: Mata al dagannoth que aparece.

text.en: Talk to Jossik again, and then kill the Dagannoth mother when it appears.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con Jossik y luego mata a la Dagannoth mother cuando aparezca.

text.en: Strategies can be found here; note that Necromancy does not have any effect on the dagannoth mother. The below table shows her weaknesses in different forms:
text.es: Aquí puedes encontrar estrategias; ten en cuenta que la Nigromancia no tiene ningún efecto sobre la Dagannoth mother. La siguiente tabla muestra sus debilidades en sus distintas formas:

rows: Air spells (Air Strike, Bolt, Blast, Wave, and Surge)
Water spells (Water Strike, Bolt, Blast, Wave, and Surge)
Earth spells (Earth Strike, Bolt, Blast, Wave, and Surge)
Fire spells (Fire Strike, Bolt, Blast, Wave, and Surge)
Melee attacks (at least rune weapons are recommended)
Ranged attacks or special attacks (at least adamant or rune crossbow recommended)

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!

text.en: Go to the 2nd floor of the lighthouse.
text.es: Ve a la 2ª planta del faro.

text.en: Show the rusty casket to Jossik.
text.es: Muéstrale el rusty casket a Jossik.

text.en: If you had a full inventory when defeating the Dagannoth mother, you will not receive a rusty casket. Instead, you must talk to Jossik, who will have picked it up for you.
text.es: Si tenías el inventario lleno al derrotar a la Dagannoth mother, no recibirás un rusty casket. En su lugar, deberás hablar con Jossik, que lo habrá recogido por ti.

text.en: You may now choose a book affiliated with three gods: Saradomin's Book of Wisdom, Guthix's Book of Balance or Zamorak's Book of Chaos.
text.es: Ahora puedes elegir un libro asociado a tres dioses: el Book of Wisdom de Saradomin, el Book of Balance de Guthix o el Book of Chaos de Zamorak.

text.en: Be sure to choose the same book twice in a row when he asks if you are sure about your selection.
text.es: Asegúrate de elegir el mismo libro dos veces seguidas cuando te pregunte si estás seguro de tu elección.
